summary: Approval Flow v139 - All CRITICAL tests PASSED. POST /api/admin/payments/{proof_id}/approve via LiveCommerceService creates orders with all required fields (approved_by, approved_at, payer_name, assigned_sales_id). Customer/payer separation verified across admin invoices, admin orders, customer invoices. Vendor privacy protected.
seed_data_creation: Approved payment proof 9aac711b-7874-44cf-a9e3-8ec9458ae1e3, created order KON-ORD-20260329153648
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRITICAL approval flow tests passing. LiveCommerceService.approve_payment_proof() correctly populates: approved_by, approved_at, payer_name, assigned_sales_id, assigned_sales_name. Vendor orders created with vendor_order_no, base_price, status=assigned. Sales assignments created with sales_owner_id. Customer notifications created with title='Payment Approved'. Admin UI shows Payer and Approved By columns. Vendor UI does NOT expose customer identity.

CRITICAL-1_order_fields.details: Order created with approved_by=admin, approved_at=2026-03-29T15:36:48, payer_name=Mac, assigned_sales_id=sales-demo-001, assigned_sales_name=Janeth Msuya

CRITICAL-2_invoice_approval_fields.details: Invoice has approved_by=admin, approved_at=2026-03-29T15:36:48, status=paid, payment_status=approved

CRITICAL-3_vendor_order_created.details: Vendor orders created when vendor_id present in items. Fields: vendor_order_no, base_price, status=assigned

CRITICAL-4_sales_assignment_created.details: Sales assignment created with sales_owner_id=sales-demo-001, sales_owner_name=Janeth Msuya, status=active_followup

CRITICAL-5_customer_notification.details: Customer notification created with title='Payment Approved', target_url='/account/invoices'

SEPARATION_admin_invoices.details: Admin invoices show customer_name and payer_name as SEPARATE fields. 15+ invoices with distinct values.

SEPARATION_admin_orders.details: Admin orders show customer_name and payer_name separately. 32/88 orders have payer_name populated.

ADMIN_UI_columns.details: Admin orders table shows: Date, Order #, Customer, Payer, Source, Total, Payment, Fulfillment, Assigned Sales, Assigned Vendor, Approved By

VENDOR_PRIVACY.details: Vendor orders at /api/vendor/orders do NOT contain customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone. Only shows: vendor_order_no, base_price, status, sales_name, sales_phone, sales_email

CUSTOMER_sales_contact.details: Customer order drawer shows real sales contact: Janeth Msuya, +255710000001, janeth.sales@konekt.demo with Call and Email buttons
